title: Allow MondayDocs Headers to be collapsed
excerpt: It would be very helpful if headers on Monday Docs were collapsible. The ability to set whether the default state of the header is collapsed or expanded would also be useful. Right now if I have a large doc, it’s very no…

posts.author: mng (Matt Ng)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful if headers on Monday Docs were collapsible. The ability to set whether the default state of the header is collapsed or expanded would also be useful. Right now if I have a large doc, it’s very noisy. Collapsing the headers would greatly neaten this up. Other documentation platforms have this feature as well.
